CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.type: Cache access type to be added by the user in MasterManaged deployment mode. Currently supported values: * BCC: Baidu Cloud Compute (BCC); * IDC: Self-built data center
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes: List of node information to be added. See appendix AddCacheNodeInfo
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.config: Node configuration, default settings in JSON string format: {  "systemConfig": {    "vm.max_map_count": 524288,    "fs.aio-max-nr": 10485760  },  "resourceConfig": {    "requestCpu": 4,    "limitCpu": 16,    "requestMem": "2GiB",    "limitMem": "8GiB"  },  "serviceConfig": {    "min_log_level": 1  }}
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.diskInfos: Disk information for the node to be added. See appendix DiskInfo. The field "format" indicates whether to format the disk before joining; if true, the target dev device to be formatted must be specified; if false, the diskQuotaGiB capacity for the specified path must be provided
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.deployPath: Service deployment path for the cache node. Default: /home/.rapidfs/
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.bccInfo: BCC cache node information. See appendix BCCCacheNodeInfo
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.idcInfo: IDC cache node information. See appendix IDCCacheNodeInfo
